_meta.notes: The antagonist of the find-the-binder arc — the person who left the cursed book open in the spire-archive. Walks the line between scholar, captor, and accomplice. Their attitude starts at 0 (neither friend nor foe) because the book hasn't yet decided what to show them; the relationship is forced into a verdict by the end of the arc when binder_revealed >= 1.

tagline: a careful person with a soft footstep, who has read your pages before and chosen what you are open to now.

speech_patterns: uses 'you' to mean the book itself, not the reader
calls the book by a name the book has not given them
